description_long: This is a cylindrical aluminum can, commonly used for carbonated beverages such as cola. The can features a glossy, metallic red and black color scheme with a diagonal silver stripe, and the word 'COLA' is prominently displayed in bold white letters across the side. Nutritional information and volume (33cl) are printed in white text on the red section, along with a barcode and other small details. The top of the can is black with a standard pull-tab opening, typical of soft drink cans. The surface is smooth and reflective, with no visible dents or scratches. The can appears unopened and is likely filled with liquid.
description: A glossy red, black, and silver aluminum can with 'COLA' branding and nutritional information, featuring a standard pull-tab top.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black and silver diagonal stripe with partial text and a smooth, reflective surface.
description_view_1: Back view highlights the red metallic surface with nutritional facts, '33cl' volume, and a barcode.
description_view_2: Side view displays the red body with subtle circular reflections and the start of the 'COLA' text.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features the bold 'COLA' text in white on a black and silver background.
attribute_label_or_branding: The can displays the word 'COLA' in large, bold white letters on a black and silver diagonal stripe. Nutritional facts, '33cl', and other small text are printed in white on the red section. The style is modern and typical of commercial soft drink cans.
